## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`node --test reference-impl/test/*.test.js`)
- [ ] Commits are signed and follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Commits carry a DCO sign-off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] No new dependencies (or discussed first)
- [ ] Spec changes: RFC issue linked above and spec version handling addressed
